message:
feat(signal): add custom time source support to graceful shutdown

GracefulConfig gains a `time_getter: Option<fn() -> Time>` field that
allows injecting a custom time source for grace-period deadlines. When
set, GracefulBuilder::run() uses `TimeoutFuture::with_time_getter` instead
of the default `timeout(wall_now(), ...)`, enabling deterministic testing
of graceful shutdown behavior with virtual clocks.

New builder method `GracefulBuilder::time_getter()` and config method
`GracefulConfig::with_time_getter()` provide ergonomic configuration.

New test futures: `ShutdownThenAdvanceTimeAndComplete` (simulates a task
that finishes within the grace period under virtual time) and
`ShutdownThenAdvanceTimeAndPending` (simulates grace period expiry).
Tests verify both the "completed within grace period" and "grace period
elapsed" outcomes using VirtualClock-driven time advancement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
